description: Default Birdeye meme-list recipes for graduation-play research across the core Solana meme launch venues.

recipes.name: grad_15m_last_trade
recipes.description: Very fresh graduates with a live tape. Good for immediate post-grad momentum checks.

recipes.name: grad_60m_last_trade
recipes.description: Fresh graduates over the last hour, still sorted by recent tape.

recipes.name: grad_60m_graduated_time
recipes.description: Fresh graduates over the last hour, ranked by graduation time instead of tape recency.

recipes.name: grad_4h_liquidity
recipes.description: Graduates from the last four hours ranked by liquidity. Good for higher-value names with some survival time.

recipes.name: pregrad_95_progress
recipes.description: About-to-graduate names clustered at the top of the bonding curve.

recipes.name: pregrad_90_progress
recipes.description: Wider near-graduation scan with a little more room before the finish line.

recipes.name: pregrad_recent_creation
recipes.description: Newly created names with strong progress and active recent trading.
